---
title: "Week 5 Class Note"
subtitle: "IBM 3202"
author: "Claudia Flores"
title-block-style: none
toc-depth: 3
toc-location: right-body
number-sections: true
code-line-numbers: true
code-fold: false
code-link: true
embed-resources: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
  error: true
---



# Class Overview

# Assignment Deadline adjustment

# Appendix

- My webpage for this work: <https://jaejungca.github.io/IBM3202-W05-classnote/w05-classnote.html>
-
